affected_pattern: Revenue-assurance leakage exceeds 0.5% contractual ceiling for two consecutive months
root_cause: New rating pipeline introduced systematic leakage — a refactor of the rating pipeline silently dropped a specific event type ('supplementary service'), moving recognized revenue below the contractual leakage threshold.
supporting_evidence: SLA Breach RCA Playbook: Revenue-Assurance Leakage Spike pattern
Event-type counter for supplementary-service is zero post-refactor
RA reconciliation shows expected-vs-actual delta above threshold
recommended_action: Restore the supplementary-service event path in rating
Backfill the missing charges with customer communication
Instrument per-event-type rating success rate dashboard
Require RA sign-off on any rating-pipeline refactor
